---
title: "yale_food_addiction_scale_yfas"
subtitle: "`yale_food_addiction_scale_yfas`"
description: "yale_food_addiction_scale_yfas"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/yale_food_addiction_scale_yfas/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                             | Title                          | Type    | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|----------------------------------|--------------------------------|---------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                          | The unique name of the event   | string  | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| `center`                         | Research center                | string  | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| `yfas_overeat_unplanned`         | yfas_overeat_unplanned         | string  | When I started to eat certain foods, I ate much more than planned Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                             |
| `yfas_eat_when_full`             | yfas_eat_when_full             | string  | I continued to eat certain foods even though I was no longer hungry. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_eat_until_sick`            | yfas_eat_until_sick            | string  | I ate to the point where I felt physically ill. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `yfas_worry_restrict`            | yfas_worry_restrict            | string  | I worried a lot about cutting down on certain types of food, but I ate them anyways. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_tired_overeating`          | yfas_tired_overeating          | string  | I spent a lot of time feeling sluggish or tired from overeating. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                              |
| `yfas_constant_eating`           | yfas_constant_eating           | string  | I spent a lot of time eating certain foods throughout the day. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                                |
| `yfas_go_far_for_food`           | yfas_go_far_for_food           | string  | When certain foods were not available, I went out of my way to get them. For example, I went to the store to get certain foods even though I had other things to eat at home. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                 |
| `yfas_food_interference`         | yfas_food_interference         | string  | I ate certain foods so often or in such large amounts that I stopped doing other important things. These things may have been working or spending time with family or friends.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                               |
| `yfas_problems_overeat`          | yfas_problems_overeat          | string  | I had problems with my family or friends because of how much I overate.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                      |
| `yfas_avoid_situations`          | yfas_avoid_situations          | string  | I avoided work, school or social activities because I was afraid I would overeat there. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                       |
| `yfas_avoid_cut_food_sad`        | yfas_avoid_cut_food_sad        | string  | When I cut down on or stopped eating cetain foods, I felt irritable, nervous or sad.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                         |
| `yfas_withdrawals`               | yfas_withdrawals               | string  | If I had physical symptoms because I handn't eaten certain foods, I would eat those foods to feel better. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                     |
| `yfas_eat_emotions`              | yfas_eat_emotions              | string  | If I had emotional problems because I handn't eaten certain foods, I would eat those foods to feel better. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                    |
| `yfas_phys_sympt`                | yfas_phys_sympt                | string  | When I cut down on or or stopped eating cetain foods, I had physical symptoms. For example, I had headaches or fatigue. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                       |
| `yfas_craving_reduced`           | yfas_craving_reduced           | string  | Yale Food Addiction Scale. Participant's report of experiencing increased cravings for certain foods when reduc-ing or stopping consumption. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                    |
| `yfas_food_stress`               | yfas_food_stress               | string  | My eating behaviour caused me a lot of distress. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `yfas_function_problems`         | yfas_function_problems         | string  | I had significant problems in my life because of food and eating. These may have been problems with my daily routine, work, school, friends, family, or health.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                              |
| `yfas_felt_bad_overeat`          | yfas_felt_bad_overeat          | string  | I felt so bad about overeating that I didn't do other important things. These things may have been working or spending time with family or friends. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                           |
| `yfas_overeat_neglect`           | yfas_overeat_neglect           | string  | My overeating got in the way of me taking care of my family og doing household chores. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                        |
| `yfas_avoid_no_foods`            | yfas_avoid_no_foods            | string  | I avoided work, school or social functions because I could not eat certain foods there.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                      |
| `yfas_avoid_appreciation`        | yfas_avoid_appreciation        | string  | I avoided social situations because people woudn't approve of how much I ate. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                 |
| `yfas_emotion_same_way`          | yfas_emotion_same_way          | string  | I kept eating in the same way even though my eating caused emotional problems. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                |
| `yfas_physical_same_way`         | yfas_physical_same_way         | string  | I kept eating the same way even though my eating caused physical problems. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                    |
| `yfas_same_eat_no_joy`           | yfas_same_eat_no_joy           | string  | Eating the same amount of food did not give me as much enjoyment as it used to. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                               |
| `yfas_stop_eat_not_able`         | yfas_stop_eat_not_able         | string  | I really wanted to cut down on or stop eating certain kinds of foods, but I just couldn't.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                   |
| `yfas_eat_more_same_feel`        | yfas_eat_more_same_feel        | string  | I needed to eat more and more to get the feelings I wanted from eating. This included reducing negative emotions like sadness or increasing pleasure.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                        |
| `yfas_do_bad_overeat`            | yfas_do_bad_overeat            | string  | I didn't do well at work or school because I was eating too much. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                             |
| `yfas_keep_harmful_eat`          | yfas_keep_harmful_eat          | string  | I kept eating certain foods even though I knew it was physically dangerous. For example, I kept eating sweets even though I had diabetes. Or I kept eating fatty foods despite having heart disease.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                         |
| `yfas_urge_cannot_think`         | yfas_urge_cannot_think         | string  | I had such strong urges to eat certain foods that I couldn't think of anything else.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                         |
| `yfas_urge_eat_now`              | yfas_urge_eat_now              | string  | I had such intens cravings for certain food that I felt like I had to eat them right away.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                   |
| `yfas_no_succes_stop_eat`        | yfas_no_succes_stop_eat        | string  | I tried to cut down on or not eat certain kinds of food, but I wasn't successful. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                             |
| `yfas_no_succ_keep_stop`         | yfas_no_succ_keep_stop         | string  | I tried and failed to cut down on or stop eating certain foods. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                               |
| `yfas_distract_eat_hurt`         | yfas_distract_eat_hurt         | string  | I was so distrated by eating that I could have been hurt (e.g., when driving a car, crossing the street, operating machinery).  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                               |
| `yfas_dist_think_hurt`           | yfas_dist_think_hurt           | string  | I was so distrated by thinking about food that I could have been hurt (e.g., when driving a car, crossing the street, operating machinery). Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                   |
| `yfas_fam_friends_worry`         | yfas_fam_friends_worry         | string  | My frieds or family were worried about how much I overate.  Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                                                   |
| `yfas_psych_problems`            | yfas_psych_problems            | string  | Participant's report of significant psychological problems (e.g., depression, anxiety, self-reproach, or guilt) resulting from their food intake. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                               |
| `yfas_physical_problems`         | yfas_physical_problems         | string  | Participant's report of physical problems or worsening of existing physical problems due to their food intake. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                  |
| `yfas_continue_despite_problems` | yfas_continue_despite_problems | string  | Participant's report of continuing to eat the same types or amounts of food despite experiencing psychological and/or physical problems. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                        |
| `yfas_tolerance`                 | yfas_tolerance                 | string  | Participant's report of experiencing the need to consume increasing amounts of certain foods over time to achieve the desired effect (e.g., relief of negative emotions or increased pleasure). Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10). |
| `yfas_loss_effect`               | yfas_loss_effect               | string  | Participant's report of experiencing that the same amount of food no longer produces the desired effect. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                        |
| `yfas_desire_to_cut_down`        | yfas_desire_to_cut_down        | string  | Participant's desire to reduce or stop consumption of certain foods. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                            |
| `yfas_attempt_cut_down`          | yfas_attempt_cut_down          | string  | Participant's report of having attempted to reduce or stop consumption of certain foods. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                        |
| `yfas_success_cut_down`          | yfas_success_cut_down          | string  | Participant's report of successfully reducing or avoiding consumption of certain foods. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                         |
| `yfas_attempt_frequency`         | yfas_attempt_frequency         | string  | Participant's report of the number of times in the past year they have attempted to reduce or completely stop consumption of certain foods. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                     |
| `yfas_other_problem_foods`       | yfas_other_problem_foods       | string  | Participant's report of other problem foods not listed above. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                                   |
| `yfas_problem_foods___1`         | Is                             | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___2`         | Chokolade                      | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___3`         | Æbler                          | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___4`         | Donuts                         | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___5`         | Broccoli                       | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___6`         | Småkager                       | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___7`         | Kage                           | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___8`         | Slik                           | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___9`         | Hvidt brød                     | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___10`        | Boller                         | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___11`        | Salat                          | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___12`        | Pasta                          | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___13`        | Jordbær                        | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___14`        | Ris                            | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___15`        | Kiks                           | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___16`        | Chips                          | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___17`        | Saltstænger                    | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___18`        | Pommes frites                  | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___19`        | Gulerødder                     | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___20`        | Bøf                            | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___21`        | Bananer                        | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___22`        | Bacon                          | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___23`        | Hamburgere                     | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___24`        | Cheeseburgere                  | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___25`        | Pizza                          | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___26`        | Sodavand                       | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |
| `yfas_problem_foods___27`        | Ingen af ovenstående           | boolean | Participant's selection of all specific foods they have problems with. Self-reported by participant. Repeated at baseline (V4), week 12 (V6) and week 52 (V10).                                                                                                                          |

: Fields in the `yale_food_addiction_scale_yfas` resource.
